backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (InfluencerApplication, BrandInquiry, Campaign, UserProfile) and CRUD/approval endpoints for an influencer marketing platform, with role-based access control via AccessControl and UserApproval mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two rebranding features (replacing 'GrowthBridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA') to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing the purpose and recent changes of key frontend source files, including rebranding updates and React Query hook fixes.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet applying Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the browser tab title to 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' and mounts the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout (Navbar, sections, forms, Footer) and conditionally renders the AdminDashboard or ProfileSetupModal based on authentication and profile state.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and an optional back button for users who lack admin permissions.
frontend/src/components/BrandInquiryForm: Form component for brand campaign inquiries with validation, dropdown selects for industry/budget/timeline, and a success modal on submission via the useSubmitBrandInquiry mutation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' branding, social media links, categorized navigation links, a contact CTA section, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the landing page hero section with a headline, subtext, and two CTA buttons (Join as Influencer, Work With Us as a Brand) that smooth-scroll to their respective forms. Includes decorative background blobs and a row of avatar initials with a stats badge.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Displays a two-column 'How It Works' section with step-by-step cards for Brands (teal accent) and Influencers (amber accent), each showing three numbered steps with titles and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/InfluencerApplic: A validated form component that collects influencer profile data (name, Instagram handle, followers, niche, engagement rate, etc.) and submits it via the useSubmitInfluencerApplication mutation, showing a success modal on completion.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: A fixed responsive navbar with smooth-scroll navigation links, active section highlighting via IntersectionObserver, a mobile hamburger menu, and Internet Identity login/logout with admin panel access support.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Renders a three-tier pricing section (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) all based on a 20% commission model, with a highlighted 'Most Popular' card and a CTA that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a user's name and email to set up their profile, with validation and submission via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation hook.
A landing page section displaying two columns of service cards—one for brands and one for influencers—with icons, titles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: A statistics section that displays four key metrics with animated counters that trigger on scroll into view using IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/SuccessModal.tsx: A reusable success confirmation modal with ESC key support, body scroll lock, and a customizable title and message.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, covering user profiles, admin checks, influencer applications, brand inquiries, and campaigns.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based design tokens (colors, radius, shadows) for both light and dark themes, plus base body/focus styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Protected admin dashboard page with tabbed views for influencers, brands, campaigns, and aggregate stats; supports inline campaign deal-value editing and status updates via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the address bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends theme with Inter font, custom shadows, border radii, accordion keyframes, and enables typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 9) describing the GrowthBridge Media app architecture, implemented features, known issues, and ongoing UX/conversion overhaul goals.
